\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
This header declares utility structures and algorithms used throughout the layered-\/media scattering solver. 

The utilities cover\+:
\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item Indexing of layers from Cartesian z (Get\+Layer\+Index)
\item Fresnel coefficients, transfer and propagation matrices for TE/\+TM (Fresnel\+Coeff, Interface\+Transfer\+Matrix, propagation\+Matrix, total\+Transfer\+Matrix)
\item Total reflection/transmission of a multilayer stack (total\+Fresnel\+Coeffs)
\item Source/observation coordinate transforms for the fast-\/tabulated Green\textquotesingle{}s functions (cartesian\+To\+Layered\+Tab, cartesian\+To\+Layered\+QS)
\item Discrete range slicing and gridding for tabulation (slice, compute\+Grid)
\item Reading helper utilities for test data (read\+Positions\+From\+File) See the .cpp for algorithmic details and numerical conventions. 
\end{DoxyItemize}

Definition in file \mbox{\hyperlink{LayeredMediaUtils_8h_source}{Layered\+Media\+Utils.\+h}}.
